name: AcadeMedia AB (publ)
summary: AcadeMedia AB (publ) operates as an independent education provider in northern Europe. It operates through four segments: Preschool, Compulsory School, Upper Secondary School, and Adult Education. As of October 27, 2020, the company operated approximately 661 preschools, compulsory schools, upper secondary schools, and adult education centers in Sweden, Norway, and Germany. The company operates preschools under the Pysslingen F√É¬∂rskolor, Espira, Joki, Stepke, and KTS brands; compulsory schools under the Pysslingen Skolor, Vittra, and Pops Academy brands; upper secondary school under the Praktiska, Drottning Blanka, NTI, LBS, ProCivitas, and Rytmus brands; and adult education units under the Eductus, Hermods, and NTI-skolan brand names. AcadeMedia AB (publ) was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
